title: CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a E-commerce Executive in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd!
